note: One-off fetch provenance. The deterministic phase (extract.mjs) never touches the network; it reads source-snapshot/ only. mathlib4_docs URLs are NOT versioned — the same URL serves a new build daily — so the snapshots below are the only archival copy of the exact bytes these records derive from. The mathlib commit embedded in every gh_link (5c206a857e6422127e45b8823dd256e1b69918da) is the version pin for the *content*; the sha256 is the pin for the *bytes*.
